candidate_definition_hints.text: ToadUI is a helper UI library, written in Python, built on top of the basic UI provided by [OpenCV](https://opencv.org/). As such, it inherits much of the UI limitations of OpenCV but also it's ease of use. The goal is to provide ready-to-use UI elements that are not already par…
